productDisplayName: Facit Men Polo Tee Blue Tshirt
description: Composition Blue polo T-shirt made of 100% premium cotton, has a ribbed collar with a buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed hems, brand embroidery on the left chest and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not dry clean or bleach Tumble dry low and dry inside-out in shade Warm iron Designed for the man of sophistication and crafted from premium cotton with fashionable cuts, this polo neck T-shirt from facit offers exemplary comfort and is sure to elevate into a wardrobe favourite. Team it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
